sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: highly useful in cooking because practical culinary value matters here. efficient energy source because that can be a strength in the right context. helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: extremely calorie dense by default because that is the unavoidable category burden. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal.

closing.summary: Palm Oil does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best in controlled amounts where fat quality is the main reason to use it.
